metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for 999online developers.

plugins.name: web-scaffold
plugins.description: Agentic web project scaffolding on incubation architecture standards — discover idea, pick lightest credible golden path (landing / full-stack / internal tool / API service), approve ADR, scaffold via official scaffolders (stubs only, zero feature code — feature work happens inside generated project), verify structurally against decision standard. Strict structure contract enforced in generated projects.

plugins.name: mobile-scaffold
plugins.description: Agentic mobile app scaffolding on incubation architecture standards (Path F) — discover idea, pick distribution mode (PWA / native / both) and lightest credible Expo stack, approve ADR, scaffold via create-expo-app (stubs only, zero feature code — feature work happens inside generated project), verify structurally against decision standard. Strict structure contract enforced in generated projects.

plugins.name: idea-incubation-review
plugins.description: Initial research + viability verdict for a raw idea against 999's internal incubation criteria — fan out three analysts (buildability, market/adoption, business), then score against the Pre-Presentation Rulebook (20-item) and the Idea Incubation Operating Model (page-09/10 scorecard) with a software-first hard gate. Answers buildable-per-docs? and viable-per-rulebook?, classifies Commercial vs Internal track, lists gaps and missing presenter deliverables. Works with zero setup; a connected Confluence-reader MCP freshens criteria and flags drift.
